summary: P3 Features Testing Complete - All 13 backend tests passed and all frontend features verified. AdvancedSearch component correctly integrated into Sales and Expenses pages. Sales Forecast page fully functional with AI-powered predictions.
critical_code_review_comments: AdvancedSearch component is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for all filter elements
Sales Forecast API returns comprehensive data structure with forecast, summary, historical, and day_of_week_pattern
Confidence intervals are correctly implemented (lower_bound <= predicted <= upper_bound)
Date picker uses browser's native date input which is functional and mobile-friendly
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing sales data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 features are fully functional. Sales page has AdvancedSearch with filters for Branch, Payment Mode, Amount range, and Date range. Expenses page has AdvancedSearch with filters for Branch, Category, Payment, Amount range, and Date range. Sales Forecast page at /sales-forecast shows AI-powered predictions with summary cards, day-of-week patterns, historical performance, and daily forecast table with confidence intervals. Sidebar link for Sales Forecast appears under Reports section.

sales_page_advanced_search.details: AdvancedSearch component visible with search input, Filters button, Branch dropdown, Payment Mode dropdown, Amount range inputs, Date range inputs

expenses_page_advanced_search.details: AdvancedSearch component visible with search input, Filters button, Branch dropdown, Category dropdown, Payment dropdown, Amount range inputs, Date range inputs

sales_forecast_page_loads.details: Page loads correctly with title 'Sales Forecast' and subtitle 'AI-powered predictions based on historical patterns'

sales_forecast_api_endpoint.details: Returns correct data structure with forecast array, summary object, historical object, and day_of_week_pattern object

sales_forecast_summary_cards.details: Shows 4 summary cards: Next X Days total, Next Week, Daily Average, and Sales Trend

sales_forecast_day_of_week_pattern.details: Shows bar chart with all 7 days, best day (Wednesday) highlighted in green, worst day (Thursday) highlighted in red

sales_forecast_historical_performance.details: Shows Last 7 Days Avg, Last 30 Days Avg, and Last 180 Days Avg

sales_forecast_daily_table.details: Shows forecast table with Date, Day, Predicted, Lower Bound, Upper Bound columns

sales_forecast_sidebar_link.details: Sales Forecast link appears in sidebar under Reports section

sales_forecast_days_parameter.details: Days dropdown offers 7, 14, 30, 60, 90 day options - all work correctly

sales_forecast_confidence_intervals.details: All forecast entries have valid confidence intervals (lower <= predicted <= upper)

sales_forecast_authentication.details: API endpoint correctly requires authentication (returns 401 without token)

date_picker_on_sales_page.details: Date picker inputs are functional and clickable on Sales page filters
